title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Syzygium aromaticum, also known as cloves, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains compounds like eugenol, which has been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and yeast that contribute to gum inflammation and infection.
